summary: Cabozantinib has demonstrated efficacy in treating advanced hepatocellar carcinoma after progression from first-line therapy like sorafenib. It is approved as part of standard care options specifically within the second-line setting due to its proven benefit compared to placebo or other controls in randomized trials involving this patient population.
